title: charax #5482
definition:
1) a pale or stake, a palisade
 2) a palisade or rampart
    2a) pales between which earth, stones, trees, and timbers are
        heaped and packed together
nasbUsage:

 2) a palisade or rampart
    2a) pales between which earth, stones, trees, and timbers are
